description: Extracts key fields from Commercial Real Estate (CRE) loan agreements including loan terms, property details, and financial parameters.

Relationship_Name.description: Name of the lending relationship or borrower group as referenced in the loan package or agreement header. Typically used to identify the primary entity associated with the loan relationship.

Commitment_Amount.description: Total loan commitment amount as defined in the agreement. Look for terms such as 'Loan Commitment', 'Committed Amount', 'Principal Sum', or 'Loan Amount'. Return only the numeric value.

Current_Principal_Balance.description: Outstanding principal balance of the loan as of the reporting or effective date. Typically found in servicing sections, payment calculations, or payoff provisions. Return numeric value only.

Original_Principal_Balance.description: Original loan principal amount funded at closing. Usually referenced as 'Original Principal Amount', 'Original Loan Amount', or 'Initial Principal Balance'. Return numeric value only.

Interest_Rate.description: Interest rate applicable to the loan. Extract the rate exactly as stated, including when the agreement defines the term indirectly by cross-reference, such as 'Interest Rate shall have the meaning set forth in the Note' or a similar referenced loan document. Look in definitions, the Note, pricing sections, and any cross-referenced provision to resolve the actual fixed rate, floating index plus spread, note rate, applicable rate, or contract rate. Return the actual percentage or rate formula when present; do not stop at the cross-reference text alone unless no underlying rate appears in the provided document.

Interest_Basis_Code.description: Day-count convention used for interest accrual, such as '30/360', 'Actual/360', or 'Actual/365'. Extract it even when the agreement defines the interest basis indirectly by cross-reference, such as referring to the Note, interest calculation provisions, or a defined term rather than stating the convention inline. Also look for equivalent phrasing like 'day-count convention', 'interest basis', 'year basis', 'computed on the basis of', or 'calculated on the basis of a 360-day year'. Resolve the actual convention from the referenced provision and return only the convention format, normalized when needed to values like '30/360', 'Actual/360', or 'Actual/365'.

Maturity_Date.description: The date on which all outstanding indebtedness becomes due. Identified via phrases such as 'Maturity Date', 'Final Payment Date', or 'Loan Termination Date'. Return the date as stated.

Original_Loan_Date.description: Date on which the loan was originally executed or closed. Look for terms such as 'Closing Date', 'Origination Date', 'Date of Execution'. Return the explicit date.

First_Payment_Due_Date.description: Date or payment-date rule for when scheduled loan payments begin. Extract this even when the agreement states it as a recurring schedule or relative timing rather than a specific calendar date, such as 'Payment Date', 'first installment due', 'initial payment date', 'commencing on', or similar language in tables, term sheets, or payment schedule sections. If an explicit first payment date is stated, return that date. If the document instead provides a recurring payment-date rule tied to another event or date, return that payment-date phrase exactly as stated.

Payment_Frequency.description: Frequency at which regular loan payments are required - e.g., monthly, quarterly, annually. Extract a single frequency term only.

Accrual_Start_Date.description: Date or accrual-start rule for when interest begins to accrue. Extract this even when the agreement states it indirectly through definitions or relative timing, such as 'Interest shall begin to accrue on', 'Accrual Start Date', 'Accrual Period', 'commencing on and including', 'the Closing Date', or similar language in definitions, payment provisions, or interest calculation sections. If an explicit accrual start date is stated, return that date as written. If the document instead defines accrual commencement relative to another date or event, return the accrual-start phrase exactly as stated, such as 'commencing on and including the Closing Date'.

Loan_Type.description: Type of loan as defined - e.g., permanent loan, construction loan, bridge loan, mezzanine loan. Found in definitions or opening recitals. Return the label exactly as used in the agreement.

Property_Address.description: Full physical address of the secured property. Extract the complete address as written, including street, city, state, and ZIP code.

Property_Type.description: Type of real estate securing the loan - e.g., multifamily, office, retail, industrial, hospitality. Typically found in definitions, collateral descriptions, or appraisal exhibits.

Reserve_Monthly_Constant.description: Monthly amount required to be deposited into any reserve account (e.g., tax reserve, insurance reserve, capital reserve), when explicitly stated as a recurring monthly constant.
